coachingText.lateCritical_v1: You haven't logged anything today and it's getting late. One entry now keeps your streak alive.
coachingText.lateCritical_v2: The day's nearly gone. Log something real, even something small, before it resets.
coachingText.lateCritical_v3: Last chance tonight. Your streak is on the line, one meal saves it.
coachingText.lateCritical_v4: Nothing logged yet and the clock's running out. One entry and you're good.
coachingText.eveningDriftProtein_v1: It's evening and you're not secured yet. Something protein-heavy now closes the day well.
coachingText.eveningDriftProtein_v2: You're drifting without a log tonight. A high-protein meal secures the day and saves your streak.
coachingText.eveningDriftProtein_v3: Still unsecured. One protein-focused meal now and today counts.
coachingText.eveningDrift_v1: It's evening and nothing's locked in. One meal logged now and your day is done.
coachingText.eveningDrift_v2: Today's slipping away. Log something now before it gets away from you.
coachingText.eveningDrift_v3: You're not secured yet. One log and that changes.
coachingText.recoveryStart_v1: Yesterday didn't happen, that's fine. Log your first meal and you're back.
coachingText.recoveryStart_v2: Clean slate today. Yesterday's done. One log and you're building again.
coachingText.recoveryStart_v3: You missed a day. What matters is starting today, log when you eat.
coachingText.recoveryStart_v4: The streak broke but the habit didn't. First meal logged and you're rebuilding.
coachingText.tightBudgetProtein_v1: You've got {{cal}} cal left and still need {{pro}}g protein. Go lean and protein-heavy next.
coachingText.tightBudgetProtein_v2: Budget's tight and protein's behind. Think eggs, chicken, or yogurt to close both gaps.
coachingText.tightBudgetProtein_v3: Not much room left, and you still need {{pro}}g protein. Pick something that covers both.
coachingText.tightBudget_v1: You've got {{cal}} cal left. Be intentional with your next meal.
coachingText.tightBudget_v2: {{cal}} calories left, not a lot of room. Make your next choice count.
coachingText.tightBudget_v3: Budget's tight. {{cal}} cal to work with, so be deliberate.
coachingText.proteinMilestone_v1: You're {{pro}}g short on protein and day {{target}} is close. Focus on that now, it's what makes today count.
coachingText.proteinMilestone_v2: Calories are fine but protein is {{pro}}g behind with a milestone in reach. That's the gap to close.
coachingText.proteinMilestone_v3: {{pro}}g protein still needed and your milestone's right there. That's your priority.
coachingText.proteinMomentum_v1: You're {{streak}} days in and protein is {{pro}}g behind. A protein-focused meal keeps the quality up.
coachingText.proteinMomentum_v2: {{streak}} days of building something real. Close the {{pro}}g protein gap to make today solid.
coachingText.proteinMomentum_v3: {{streak}}-day streak going. Protein is {{pro}}g short, focus on that next.
coachingText.proteinPriority_v1: Calories are fine but you're {{pro}}g short on protein. Focus there next.
coachingText.proteinPriority_v2: Protein's lagging by {{pro}}g. That's the thing to prioritize in your next meal.
coachingText.proteinPriority_v3: Good on calories, {{pro}}g short on protein. Shift your focus there.
coachingText.strongProtein_v1: You've got {{cal}} cal to work with. Use it on protein, that's what turns a good day into a strong one.
coachingText.strongProtein_v2: {{cal}} calories of room and protein still needs attention. Make that next meal count.
coachingText.strongProtein_v3: Plenty of budget left. Protein is where the value is right now.
coachingText.strongMomentum_v1: {{cal}} cal left and {{streak}} days of consistency behind you. Make the rest of today count.
coachingText.strongMomentum_v2: Strong position with {{streak}} days running. Make your remaining meals count.
coachingText.strongMomentum_v3: You've got headroom and momentum. {{cal}} cal left, finish today with intention.
coachingText.strongPosition_v1: You're in a good spot, {{cal}} cal left with plenty of day ahead. Focus on quality.
coachingText.strongPosition_v2: {{cal}} calories to go and time to use them well. Pick meals that matter.
coachingText.strongPosition_v3: Room to work with today. {{cal}} cal remaining, finish with intention.
coachingText.highQualityMilestone_v1: Calories and protein are both on point. {{daysText}} to your milestone, keep this going.
coachingText.highQualityMilestone_v2: Strong day, both targets hit. {{daysText}} from your milestone, just maintain.
coachingText.highQualityMilestone_v3: You're nailing it today. Milestone's close, stay the course.
coachingText.highQualityDay_v1: Calories and protein are both where they should be. This is the kind of day that builds results.
coachingText.highQualityDay_v2: Everything's on track. Keep this pattern going.
coachingText.highQualityDay_v3: Quality day. Nothing to correct, just maintain.
coachingText.daySecuredProtein_v1: Day's secured but protein is {{pro}}g short. One more good meal makes this a strong day.
coachingText.daySecuredProtein_v2: You've logged in, good. {{pro}}g more protein would make today count for more.
coachingText.daySecuredProtein_v3: Secured but protein needs work. Close that {{pro}}g gap and today's solid.
coachingText.daySecured_v1: You've secured today. See if you can improve it with one more quality meal.
coachingText.daySecured_v2: Logged and secured. Can you push it from good to great?
coachingText.daySecured_v3: Day's locked in. One better meal upgrades the whole thing.
coachingText.milestoneMomentum_v1: You're close to a milestone and building real consistency. These last days matter most.
coachingText.milestoneMomentum_v2: Momentum and milestone are lining up. Don't let up now.
coachingText.milestoneMomentum_v3: Almost there. Momentum's on your side, keep the focus.
coachingText.milestonePressure_v1: You're {{daysText}} from your next milestone. Stay with it, these days count.
coachingText.milestonePressure_v2: Milestone in {{daysText}}. You've earned this, stay locked in.
coachingText.milestonePressure_v3: So close. Just consistency, that's all that's left.
coachingText.momentumBuilding_v1: {{streak}} days in. You're building real consistency and today keeps it going.
coachingText.momentumBuilding_v2: {{streak}} days running. This is where habits start to stick.
coachingText.momentumBuilding_v3: You're {{streak}} days in. One more day solidifies the pattern.
coachingText.momentumBuilding_v4: {{streak}}-day streak. You're past the hardest part, keep the rhythm.
coachingText.onTrackMorning_v1: New day. Log your first meal when you're ready.
coachingText.onTrackMorning_v2: Morning. Log when you eat, the rest takes care of itself.
coachingText.onTrackMorning_v3: Fresh start today. Log your first meal and build from there.
coachingText.onTrack_v1: You're on track. Keep logging and the numbers sort themselves out.
coachingText.onTrack_v3: On pace. Nothing to correct, just keep going.
